name: ༺⚠️ Don't Stick Your   in These Holes ⚠️༻
description:
🌙🚜 ༺📖 Don’t Stick Your In These Holes 📖༻ 🚜🌙

⚠️ "Don’t stick your in these holes.
Don’t stick your in these holes.
These holes three are not for thee." ⚠️

🌲🏚️ An Ozarks Backroad Tale of Curiosity, Bad Decisions, and One Very Unfortunate Morning... 🏚️🌲

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨🐄⚠️ 𝑭𝒂𝒓𝒎𝒆𝒓'𝒔 𝑾𝒂𝒓𝒏𝒊𝒏𝒈 ⚠️🐄✨

🥇 First Hole 🌹

✨ The best choice... if you're feeling lucky. ✨

🥈 Second Hole 🌸

💫 A little younger, a little sweeter, and just as tempting. 💫

🥉 Third Hole 🚨

⚠️ Proceed at your own risk... ⚠️

💀 You might end up learning the farmer's lesson the hard way. 💀

🚜🌙 Remember: Not every hole is a goal. 🌙🚜
